fault_hypothesis: The overlap detection on line 67 incorrectly uses non-strict inequalities (`<=`, `>=`), which fails to detect when time slots are adjacent. It should use strict inequalities (`<`, `>`) to correctly identify touching slots as conflicts.

spec.expr: any(not (b__1 <= s or a__1 >= e) for s, e in timeline) == any(not (b__1 < s or a__1 > e) for s, e in timeline)

constraints.intent: The buggy overlap condition should yield the same result as the correct one using strict inequalities.

spec.expr: all(a__1 != e and b__1 != s for s, e in timeline)

constraints.intent: The new window's endpoints should not coincide with any existing slot's endpoints, which the buggy logic permits.

spec.expr: all(result__1[i][1] < result__1[i+1][0] for i in range(len(result__1) - 1))

constraints.intent: The updated timeline must not contain any adjacent or overlapping slots.

spec.expr: not __cbfl_result[0] or all(window[1] < s or window[0] > e for s, e in timeline)

constraints.intent: If a window is successfully placed, it must not overlap or touch any existing slot.
